nredisstack_sync.signature: SortedSetIntersectionLength(RedisKey[] keys, long limit = 0, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: keys
params.description: The keys of the sorted sets.

params.name: limit
params.description: If the intersection cardinality reaches limit partway through the computation, the algorithm will exit and yield limit as the cardinality (defaults to 0 meaning unlimited).

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The number of elements in the resulting intersection.
